title: carex subdita var. kiyozumiensis
intro: Carex subdita var. kiyozumiensis, also known as the Japanese sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and promoting immune function. Carex subdita var. kiyozumiensis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses.
